characters.appearance: A young adult male, likely in his early twenties, with a medium build and fair complexion. He has dark, voluminous hair styled upwards and a neatly trimmed beard and mustache. His facial features are expressive, with prominent eyebrows and a defined jawline.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a black and white plaid button-up shirt, unbuttoned at the collar, revealing a silver chain with a small pendant. On his left wrist, he has a silver watch with a light blue strap, and a silver ring on his right hand.
characters.demeanor: Initially confident and aggressive, gesturing emphatically while speaking. His demeanor shifts to surprised and slightly bewildered after an interaction.

characters.appearance: A young adult male, similar age and build to Character A, with a fair complexion. He has dark, medium-length hair. His appearance is brief, mostly seen from behind or partially from the side.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a plain brown button-up shirt.
characters.demeanor: Calm and slightly amused, delivering a punchline.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: डट जा तू। [You wait.]
Character A says: मेरा साला आ रहा है, वो English में बताएगा तने। [My brother-in-law is coming, he will tell you in English.]
Character A says: Fluent English बोलता है मेरा साला। [My brother-in-law speaks fluent English.]
Character A says: हां जीजा, आ जाओ। [Yes brother-in-law, come.]
Character A says: बताओ इन्हें! [Tell them!]
Character B says: क्या बताऊं? [What to tell?]
Character A says: तूने कहा था ना तेरी English strong है? [Didn't you say your English is strong?]
Character B says: हां, "Myself is coming!" [Yes, "Myself is coming!"]
Character A says: राजा साहब, [Raja Sahab,]
Character A says: तुम्हारी इस टूटी English के चक्कर में आज हम पिटेंगे। Supernova app से practice शुरू कर दो! [Because of your broken English we will get beaten today. Start practicing with Supernova app!]
Character A says: ओ। [Oh.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a comedic confrontation where Character A relies on B's English skills.
- Reveals the problem: B's English is actually terrible, leading to embarrassment.
- Introduces Supernova as the practical solution to avoid such real-world embarrassments and build true speaking confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Speak English with Confidence. Download Supernova.
